name: M&T Bank ATM
description_short: M&T Bank operates 39 ATMs across Buffalo, NY, providing 24-hour cash access at bank branches, retail locations, and partner merchants like Speedway and Delta Sonic.
description_long:
M&T Bank is a regional financial institution with a long-standing presence in the Northeast, particularly in New York and Delaware. The company maintains a substantial ATM network as part of its broader banking services, with the Buffalo location serving as a regional hub. M&T Bank positions itself as FDIC-insured and emphasizes its financial strength, sound management, and reliability in serving both consumer and business customers.

M&T Bank's ATM network in Buffalo includes standalone ATM-only locations, ATMs co-located at full-service branches, and ATMs embedded in third-party retail environments. Their Buffalo network includes ATMs at Buffalo General Hospital, Buffalo State College, multiple Speedway convenience stores, Delta Sonic car washes, and dedicated M&T Bank branch locations. Many ATMs operate 24 hours, with drive-up access available at select locations. All ATMs can be reached via their general customer service line at (800) 724-2440.

What distinguishes M&T Bank's ATM network is its integration with a full-service banking operation and strategic placement in high-traffic locations. The company leverages partnerships with major convenience store chains and healthcare facilities to maximize accessibility. As a major regional bank, M&T Bank customers benefit from nationwide ATM access beyond just Buffalo locations through their broader network and potential reciprocal agreements with other financial institutions.

For consumers seeking ATM access in Buffalo, M&T Bank offers reliable, widely-distributed options with strong 24-hour availability. However, the website provides no information about foreign transaction fees, surcharge policies, balance inquiry capabilities, or whether these ATMs accommodate non-M&T customers. The listing is purely a location directory without details on deposit capabilities, withdrawal limits, or fee structures.
address: One Fountain Plaza, 575 Main St, Buffalo, NY 14203

company_info.headquarters: One Fountain Plaza, 575 Main St, Buffalo, NY 14203

pros: 39 ATM locations across Buffalo providing extensive geographic coverage
Multiple 24-hour ATM-only locations at Buffalo General Hospital, Speedway convenience stores (5+ locations), and Buffalo State College
Drive-up ATM access available at select locations like Elmwood Avenue branch
ATMs integrated with full-service M&T Bank branches offering in-person banking options
Strategic placement in high-traffic retail locations (Delta Sonic, Speedway) for customer convenience
FDIC-insured, backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Centralized customer service line (800) 724-2440 for all ATM-related inquiries
cons: Website provides no information about ATM fees, surcharges, or whether non-customers can use the machines
No details on withdrawal limits, deposit capabilities, or accepted card types
Limited to Buffalo, NY location only—no visibility into out-of-area ATM network access
No information about balance inquiry features, transfer capabilities, or mobile app integration
Some locations listed as 'Closed' or with limited hours (Delta Sonic 1808, some branch lobbies)
best_for: M&T Bank customers seeking convenient cash withdrawal across Buffalo
Consumers in Buffalo neighborhoods with nearby Speedway or Delta Sonic locations
Patients and visitors at Buffalo General Hospital needing 24-hour ATM access
Business professionals working downtown Buffalo near One M&T Plaza or Main Street branches
diagnosis: M&T Bank ATM is best for existing M&T Bank customers in Buffalo seeking reliable 24-hour cash access across the city, particularly those near convenience stores, hospitals, or branch locations. The main caveat is that the website is purely a location directory with no fee information, customer eligibility details, or clarity on non-customer access—consumers must contact M&T Bank directly to understand pricing and usage policies.
services: 24-hour ATM cash withdrawal at standalone locations
ATM access at full-service M&T Bank branches during business hours
Drive-up ATM access at select locations
ATM placement at healthcare facilities (Buffalo General Hospital)
ATM placement at educational institutions (Buffalo State College)
ATM placement at convenience retail partners (Speedway - 5 locations)
ATM placement at auto service partners (Delta Sonic car washes - 3 locations)
Online appointment booking for branch visits
Multi-language support and accessibility features (FDIC information in multiple formats)
